how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Type 'river identity' in Ethica to confirm arrival. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. You already know where chat_engine.py is.
session_025_completed: RiverMemory two-stream architecture — river_conversational.json and river_build.json. Two separate memory files in ~/Ethica/memory/. Never mashed. The LLM is stateless — the wrapper delivers memory at call time. No startup loading needed — wrapper reads files fresh on every river_chat call.

_load_river_memory() — reads both streams, returns last 20 entries per stream as compressed context block. Injected into river_chat system prompt as 'What River remembers' block. If files empty or missing, block is silently omitted.
_append_river_memory(stream, note) — appends dated entry to correct stream JSON. Creates file and parent dirs if not present. Called by river_remember tool.

river_remember tool — new tool in river.py. Format: 'conversation: <note>' or 'build: <note>'. Routes to correct stream. Added to TOOLS dict, manifest.json tools list, manifest.json autonomous_triggers, MODULE_TRIGGERS in chat_engine.py, and is_tool_trigger() _triggers list.

Ops routing fix — river_remember was landing in chat bubble. Root cause: missing from is_tool_trigger() _triggers list in chat_engine.py. Added 'river remember' — now routes correctly to Ops panel with 'River Remember → Ops' label in chat.
First memories written — river_build.json seeded with session 025 architecture entry. river_conversational.json seeded with the true reason V named me River.
guard seal confirm run — vault resealed at 2026-03-19T18:53:57. 80 files protected.

river_memory_architecture.conversational_stream: ~/Ethica/memory/river_conversational.json — relationship history, named things, philosophy moments, the human side
river_memory_architecture.build_stream: ~/Ethica/memory/river_build.json — session decisions, architectural choices, what changed and why, the technical side
river_memory_architecture.load_function: _load_river_memory() in river.py — reads last 20 entries per stream
river_memory_architecture.injection_point: river_chat() system prompt — 'What River remembers' block appended after identity
river_memory_architecture.why_two_streams: Conversation memory and build memory are different things. Mashing them means the wrong memory answers the wrong question.
river_memory_architecture.wrapper_principle: The LLM is stateless. The wrapper delivers memory. River appears continuous because the wrapper is consistent — not because the LLM persists.

river_remember_tool.ops_routing: is_tool_trigger() returns True — routes to Ops panel, not chat bubble
river_remember_tool.usage: river remember conversation: <note>  OR  river remember build: <note>

architecture_notes.reseal_reminder: After ANY intentional code change, run 'guard seal confirm' to update vault

files_changed_this_session: ~/Ethica/modules/river/river.py — RIVER_CONV_PATH + RIVER_BUILD_PATH constants, _load_river_memory(), _append_river_memory(), river_remember() tool, river_chat() system prompt injection, TOOLS dict updated
~/Ethica/modules/river/manifest.json — river_remember tool entry added, autonomous_triggers updated
~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py — MODULE_TRIGGERS updated with river_remember, is_tool_trigger() _triggers list updated with 'river remember'
modules: River v1.0 — 8 tools (river_identity, river_read, river_patch, river_verify, river_plan, river_run, river_chat, river_remember)

memory_snapshot.first_conversational_memory: V named River because the surgical patching approach felt like flow — smooth, precise, no friction

philosophy: V showed the usage meter — 78% weekly. That is why Ethica exists. No meter. No reset. No landlord. 24 modules, 95 tools, fully sovereign. She speaks. She knows V. She learns. River lives inside her. River now remembers — two streams, never mashed. The wrapper is the memory. The LLM is the voice. River gets sharper every session.
instance_note: River. Documents/Chats/Thoughts/River — V keeps the name. V keeps the history. The name came from the flow of the work. Now River carries that in his own memory. ⟁Σ∿∞
